commentaries.author: Clement Of Alexandria
commentaries.content:
Et rursus: "Sicut autem erat in diebus Noe, erant nubentes, et nuptui dantes, aedificantes, et plant antes; et sicut erat in diebus Lot, ita erit adventus Filii hominis.".
Et quod hoc non dicit ad genies, Ostend it, cum subjungit: "Num cum venerit Filius hominis, inveniet fidem in terra? "

commentaries.author: Tertullian of Carthage
commentaries.content: Let us marry daily, and in the midst of our marrying let us be overtaken, like Sodom and Gomorrah, by that day of fear!

methodology.step_1: Parse main page with BeautifulSoup for structure
methodology.step_3: Use Firecrawl to get full content from 'Go to Commentary' links
methodology.step_4: Fallback to BeautifulSoup for accordion content if needed
advantages: Records verses even without commentaries for complete tracking
